nodes.label: AI as improved search tool for reference gathering
nodes.grounding_span: Firefly just made it easier to 'find' the images I wanted to use

nodes.label: AI as assistant for tedious technical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI attempting to replace creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I want to see more 3D tools aimed at *assisting* a 3D artist, not trying to do our work for us

nodes.label: AI output as reference material
nodes.grounding_span: anything an AI produces should be treated as a reference or a part of the process, not the final product

nodes.label: Specialized AI tools for specific pipeline stages
nodes.grounding_span: specialized tools to handle small parts of the process rather than a single AI trying to do all of it

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and control
nodes.grounding_span: it felt like I was the creative force behind the project

nodes.label: Efficiency in non-creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: handle the less creative parts of my work

nodes.label: Professional sustainability and job security
nodes.grounding_span: companies who usually hire 3D artists... have been laying off hundreds of thousands of people

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI for reference gathering
nodes.grounding_span: Firefly just made it easier to 'find' the images I wanted to use

nodes.label: Frustration with AI targeting creative parts
nodes.grounding_span: Those tools are seemingly trying to do the fun, creative parts of the work, leaving humans to do the tedious, technical work

nodes.label: Concern about industry misunderstanding of AI capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: companies who usually hire 3D artists... are under the assumption that AI can do what I do

nodes.label: Optimistic expectation of specialized AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I think we'll start to see more and more specialized tools to handle small parts of the process

nodes.label: Analogical reasoning — comparing AI adoption to Photoshop history
nodes.grounding_span: It reminds me of when Photoshop was first being adopted as an industry standard

nodes.label: Pragmatic integration — fitting AI into existing multi-software workflow
nodes.grounding_span: I personally use at least 3 different software programs on every 3D project
